headline: Antitrust Trial Puts Live Nation Ticketing Power And Valuation In Focus
summary: US antitrust trial is examining Live Nation Entertainment's ticketing practices and influence over venue access. Recent testimony highlights allegations about how the company handles artist choice and third party promoters at Live Nation controlled venues. Case is drawing attention to competition and market power in the live events business at a time when NYSE:LYV trades around $156.47. For investors watching Live Nation Entertainment, the focus has shifted from recent share performance to...

headline: States Push Trial as DOJ Reaches Live Nation Settlement
summary: More than 30 states continue antitrust trial after DOJ deal allows Live Nation to retain Ticketmaster without a breakup.
